prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息类、电气工程及其自动化属高热推荐专业，数学类推荐；但化学工程与工艺、材料科学与工程、 环境工程等属明显劝退专业，土木建筑分化观望。专业结构冷热分化明显。重庆市物理类考生2021年98954人增至2025年139478人，持续增长；2026年总考生209000人，按近年物 理类占比约65%估算约135850人，较2025年略降约2.6%，竞争略有缓解。省控线（本科批）近年稳定在406–446分区间，2025年425分，无明显波动；福州大学位 于福建省，非重庆本地高校；在重庆招生占比约2%–5%，属跨省招生，地域偏好因素中性。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16220 → 16719 → 18673 → 18320 → 22294, showing an overall backward trend, especially in 2025 with a shift of about 3974 places compared to 2024, with significant fluctuations; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 22294. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 21 in 2021, 25 from 2022 to 2025, and 25 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fuzhou University is a 211 and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026, it is approximately 77th, with stable rankings in the 72–81 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; in 2024, reputation was slightly negative (campus safety incident); Douyin popularity total ranking 88th, rated as 'average'; no record of enrollment cutoff gaps. Overall application attention is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at this university, but the Chemistry major is not offered in Chongqing Physics Category; other enrollment majors (Electronic Information, Mathematics, Materials, etc.) did not receive individual A-class ratings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended popular majors; Mathematics is recommended; but Chemical Engineering and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Engineering are clearly discouraged majors; Civil Engineering and Architecture are in a wait-and-see state. The major structure shows clear differentiation between hot and cold. The number of Chongqing Physics Category examinees increased from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, with continuous growth; in 2026, total examinees are 209,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 135,850 based on the recent proportion of about 65%, a slight decrease of about 2.6% compared to 2025, easing competition slightly. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has been stable in the 406–446 range in recent years, with 425 in 2025, no significant fluctuations; Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, not a local university in Chongqing; the enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2%–5%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with neutral regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal backward shift of about 4000 places in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, slight decrease in total Chongqing Physics Category examinees, and stable university reputation, it is expected that the ranking in 2026 will slightly recover (easier to enter). Predicted minimum ranking is about 22094, with a range of 21594–22594.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 21500), prioritize popular majors like Electronic Information and Mathematics; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 22500), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure Tier 3 as a safety.
